description: Frankie Financial, now branded FrankieOne, provides identity verification, KYC/KYB, AML, fraud, and related compliance services for customer and business onboarding. Its platform supports verification workflows, screening, document checks, and risk assessment across testing, UAT, and production environments.
summary: Frankie Financial / FrankieOne exposes two documented REST API surfaces: a current FrankieOne v2 API and a legacy Frankie Financial Compliance Utility v1.2 API; both require issued customer-scoped API credentials sent in headers.

surfaces.name: Frankie Financial Compliance Utility API (legacy v1.2)
